home.aboutDescription1: BookStore is a modern online platform where readers can discover, explore, and purchase books across all genres. From timeless classics to the latest bestsellers, we bring reading closer to everyone.
home.aboutDescription2: Our mission is to make reading accessible, enjoyable, and convenient through a seamless shopping experience powered by modern technology.
home.readingDescription: Books open doors to new worlds, ideas, and possibilities. Whether you're learning, escaping reality, or exploring imagination — every page brings something meaningful.
home.whyTitle: Everything You Need For A Better Reading Experience
home.whyDescription: We bring together thousands of books from different genres, making it easy to discover your next favorite read.
home.collectionDescription: Browse novels, education, business, technology, children's books and much more.
home.deliveryDescription: Quick and reliable shipping so your books arrive safely and on time.
home.reviewDescription: Read authentic reviews from our community before making your purchase.
home.secureDescription: Safe checkout and reliable customer support for every order.

modal.confirm_text: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible.
